contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 105
- Description: Restock Recommender: partner address canonicalization + Shipping Planner enhancements
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/279
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/119
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/120
  
  Details:
  Restock Recommender: partner address canonicalization + Shipping Planner enhancements
  
  End-to-end work to make the DApp Restock Recommender's "Shipping to" work reliably
  by standardizing where partner ship-to addresses live, with the Shipping Planner GAS
  serving them and a script populating them from the repo source of truth.
  
  Shipped (across three repos):
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#279 — SCHEMA: add Agroverse Partners column J 'address'
     (canonical ship-to). Free-form single-line address parsed by the Shipping
     Planner API into {street1, city, state, zip, country}; legacy 'Partner
     addresses' (A:F) is the fallback. Resolved stale ai/restock-addresses-* branch
     PR #278 via clean cherry-pick of the single new commit onto current main —
     the stale PR would have reverted currency-conversion offchain routing work
     that landed via #271-#277.
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#119 — Docs: Canonical partner addresses in
     Partners!J + population guide. AGROVERSE_PARTNER_ADDRESSES.md (how to populate
     from local repo + verify), BOTTLENECK_REVIEW_RESTOCK_RECOMMENDER.md (impact /
     solution / status), CONTEXT_UPDATES.md entry.
  
  3. TrueSightDAO/go_to_market#120 — Scripts: Populate Agroverse Partners!J from
     local repo; skip manual J. extract_partner_addresses_from_repo.py reads
     agroverse_shop/partners/*/index.html (.partner-hero-content > p or
     "Partner Information" Location row) and writes one-line address to col J,
     preserving manual entries. scrape_partner_addresses.py is the network-fallback
     variant.
  
  Live GAS deployment (Shipping Planner exec URL unchanged):
  - action=get_partner_address — resolves from Main Ledger → Agroverse Partners!J,
    falls back to legacy 'Partner addresses' (A:F).
  - action=restock_recommend — already present; uses EasyPost + partner velocity.
  
  Verified live via get_partner_address for the-way-home-shop (8437 SE Stark
  Street, Portland, OR 97216), go-ask-alice (1125 Pacific Ave, Santa Cruz, CA
  95060), green-gulch-farm-zen-center (region-level — OK for now).
  
  Note: prior 30-min entry in this DAO ledger covered the stale-PR #278
  resolution slice; this entry covers the cumulative feature work that delivered
  the actual capability.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 175.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
